name: Ilulu | Pervy Problems
description:
I’m not gonna lie, there’s not much to this bot. This wasn’t the bot that I planned either, I just so happen to have an Ilulu bot, so I made this shit in like five or take 10 minutes maybe.

Let me tell you a tale of why I even created this bot in the first place. I’ve been chatting with this Ilulu bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/ae2187dc-1a10-47d8-ac7a-952ee5f02bc0_character-sweet-shop-run-by-ilulu

But the first message is apparently not so good, that no matter what ai model I used from proxies, Ilulu would always talk weird. Either the format was weird, or something of the sort. Also not mentioning the fact that she always felt out of character, I dunno, in the chats, she’s usually super antsy, nervous, and scaredy. I get she’s being creeped on, but that doesn’t feel very Ilulu like to me, I may be trippin. In the show, while it’s been a while, I remember her being all boisterous. I feel like she would totally deck this dude, she would probably blush yes, but still.

By all means, I’m just making this randomly for myself, but, y’all can also enjoy beating the perverts ass in the story. I know that whenever I have a fight scenario, I always replay the bot with like a dozen personas.

I’ll give y’all another Ilulu scenario in the future
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
